narrative:
Precinct Green Springs Village (precinct in Seneca County) has 393 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.5 percentage points.
